text_blocks.text:
Assessment of Financial Transparency and Accountability (FTA) Implementation in Ethiopia

Final Report

RFP No: ET-NCB-MOFEC-COPCU-129904-CS-QCBS

SUBMITTED TO:
Ministry of Finance (MoF)
Addis Ababa, Ethiopia

SUBMITTED BY:
TAK-Innovative Research and Development Institute PLC (TAK-IRDI)
Addis Ababa, Ethiopia

August 2022
